form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 5 length third (20.01) over 350m at Grafton. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 5 length third (20.01) over 350m at Grafton. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: Recorded a 1.5 lengths win (17.80) in a Grade 5 last time at this track. Has three wins and two placings from nine starts from the draw. Suited here and expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Recorded a 1.5 lengths win (17.80) in a Grade 5 last time at this track. Has three wins and two placings from nine starts from the draw. Suited here and expected to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 4 length second (17.56) over 300m at this track. Has ability and can run well.

formComments.comment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 4 length second (17.56) over 300m at this track. Has ability and can run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened between runners rounding the turn into the front straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 7 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Looks tested and others preferred this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame last start when fourth and beaten 7 lengths at this track. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Looks tested and others preferred this time.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 3 lengths at this track (17.59) beating Done By Noon in a Grade 5 on April 8. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 3 lengths at this track (17.59) beating Done By Noon in a Grade 5 on April 8. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.93) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting five victories and seven places from 21 starts. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.93) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 9 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting five victories and seven places from 21 starts. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 300m at this track (17.02), beating Mrs. Jacobs. Has run hot time here with a 17.02 PB at the distance. Key chance.
